Warsh is not a hawk | Intraday post (03/Feb)

At market lunch-time, you will receive an email with announcements about the Substack, review of the performance of my analyses and a short reflection!The review part is extremely important for all of you who follow me, in order to have a backtested data about the accuracy rate of the analyses.

At market lunch-time, you will receive an email with announcements about the Substack, review of the performance of my analyses and a short reflection!The review part is extremely important for all of you who follow me, in order to have a backtested data about the accuracy rate of the analyses.

Weekly post:

Warsh, Gold, Sentiment | Weekly post (02-06/Feb)

Describing the bubble, the coming crisis, market, economy and geo context:

Just as I predicted… you just don’t listen. You listen to furus instead…

For ES futures, I’m bullish on a move towards 7040, until it holds above 6955/60 zone, that is a pivot. The strongest spot is 6970/80 zone. If it loses 7k, that would be my first target to step in. If pivot is lost, I’m only in if it goes down to 6900, bet less conviction, especially if it looks beyond it. Headline risk is high and relative complacency too.

Let’s look at the daily positioning…

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

Highly negative net speed profile today as well. The positioning is more about defending the downside, braking the move if the spot turns down, rather than betting on upside squeeze. To the upside, the net effect is flat, market doesn’t really have a bet. It’s primal bet is selling downside volatility, and upside vvol.

Centroid is at 6968.13 - 6953.42 range.

Downside pivot is at 6945.36with target of 6932.02The downside target is a reversionish bet, especially during the PM session. Market tolerates 6920 but there it expects pin. You will see, if volatility calms down and starts to rangebound below the target or vol remains high and it reverses. For a reversion, the centroid is the primal target, but 6980 is a local and very strong pin.If the 6920 local magnet is accepted, the market tolerates 6905/00 zone too during the PM session. Low probability but it is there to defend the downside.

Upside pivot is at 7005.77with target of 7025.53The upside pivot is a “line in the sand”. Highly probable that the market will reject it and pin to 6980, but during the AM session, market can break through it. The target is a strong pin, with margin of error of 7030

Downside vol selling is not too confident today. Be carefuly about ehadline risk today.
